overall.description: First-person exploration of an abandoned medical facility or asylum in a horror game. The player navigates through dimly lit corridors bathed in red emergency lighting, passing through waiting areas and rooms with scattered medical equipment and graffiti-covered walls.

segments.scene_description: The player begins in a small room with a fire extinguisher visible, then moves into larger red-lit corridors of an abandoned facility. The environment features concrete walls, scattered debris, and emergency lighting as the player approaches a metal shutter at the end of the hall.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a white-tiled corridor with graffiti on the walls and empty metal shelving. The player approaches and passes through double doors marked with an illuminated EXIT sign, leaving the red-lit section behind.

lights go out, entering pitch black corridor with only faint red glow visible

red graffiti text reading 'Face It' on white wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging through the exit doors into a small waiting area with chairs and distinctive 'Face It' graffiti, the lighting shifts to bright fluorescent. The player then turns into a corridor where the lights suddenly go out, plunging the scene into near-total darkness.

entering room with hospital bed and privacy curtain

scattered medical supplies and equipment on the floor
blue fabric privacy curtain around hospital bed

walls covered in extensive black spray-painted graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the darkness into a lit medical ward, the player navigates through corridors lined with abandoned hospital beds and medical equipment. The walls are covered in extensive graffiti. The player enters a room with a hospital bed surrounded by privacy curtains, examining the derelict medical environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a derelict medical facility that shifts from oppressive red emergency lighting into a stark, graffiti-strewn ward. It begins in a small room beside a fire extinguisher before gliding into wide concrete corridors bathed in red light and cluttered with debris. As the camera passes through a metal shutter, the environment transitions into a white-tiled hallway lined with empty shelving and graffiti, eventually leading through double doors marked by an illuminated exit sign. The scene then opens into a bright fluorescent waiting area featuring distinctive wall art before plunging into sudden, near-total darkness as the camera turns into a new corridor. Finally, the view emerges from the blackness into a lit medical ward, navigating past abandoned hospital beds and privacy curtains amidst walls covered in extensive graffiti.
